signals.headline: AMBER Amber Enterprises India Limited: Amalgamation/Merger
signals.summary: Pursuant to Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR Regulations, we are hereby informing the exchange regarding an update on hearing of the joint first motion application bearing no. CA(CAA)/11/Chd/Pb/2026 held on 17 April 2026, filed in relation to scheme of amalgamation between the Company and AmberPR Technoplast India Private Limited, the Wholly Owned Subsidiary of the Company, wherein the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal has reserved the order in the application.
